heroImage.alt: Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India, Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches of God in India has around 1,200 churches in its network with its headquarters at Itarsi, Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches of God in India has around 1,200 churches in its network with its headquarters at Itarsi, Madhya Pradesh, India. The fellowship unanimously re-elected Dr. Matthew K. Thomas as chairman during the October Fellowship Conference in 2008. The Fellowship is regarded as one of the largest independent Pentecostal churches in India.

topPlaces.description: Itarsi is a city and municipality in Narmadapuram in Madhya Pradesh, India. Itarsi is a key hub for agricultural goods and Itarsi Junction railway station is the biggest railway junction in Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.description: Pawarkheda is a village in the Narmadapuram tehsil of Narmadapuram district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is 9 km from Itarsi, the major rail junction in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India?
faq.a: The best time to visit Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Itarsi Junction (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India?
faq.a: Stays in Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Fellowship of the Pentecostal Churches in India?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mehara Gaon, Itarsi, Bhilakhedi, Pawarkheda.
